_note: STUB CONTENT for wiring/demo only. Marketing session authors the real copy. Schema: universalDay + personalDay keyed by number ('1'-'9','11','22','33'); lifePathOverlay[lifePath][personalDay] is an optional partial that merges over personalDay (overlay fields win, base is always the fallback). AdviceEntry = {title, summary, guidance, focus, do[], avoid[], rating}.
